PR #157 review (Claude, Fable 5, orchestrator). Carrier diff = 4 JSON files under docs/reviews/pr-151/, +60/-0, no code. VERIFIED: files are well-formed JSON with all required leg/finding fields; the pr-151 legs attest hash c258432 which review_gate.py --pr 151 --base origin/main confirms is the current main...dev release diff hash (gate PASS); dispositions honest (X1->#156, X2->#153, X3 dismissed false-positive with branch-analysis reasoning); no code, no executable content, no workflow/gate-script file. Empty-diff hash (e3b0c44) confirms the carrier changes nothing the gate hashes.

--- Carrier note ---
Docs-only release-artifact carrier (docs/process/review-gate.md release scope): adds docs/reviews/pr-151/ (the v0.1.1 dev->main battery legs) plus this pr-157/ set. Entire diff is under docs/reviews/, which the gate excludes from its hash — so the reviewed_diff_sha256 here is the empty-string sha256 (e3b0c44...), and merging this carrier does not restale PR #151's attestation.
